2168230.name: Gun Swinger
2168230.description:
Don't think! Don't walk! Just keep on swinging!

In Gun Swinger there is no floor! Use your bungee to swing your self through the world! There is no stopping!
Use your momentum to boost your powers with Velocity Speed.

Fire away your heart pounding blistering fast weapons!

Use your arsenal of weapons to defeat all enemies standing in your way!
With high velocity and extreme motion you will burn a way through the world!
Test your limits! Feel the music! Bring your ambition!

Collect coins to gain upgrades!

Kill enemies to generate gold that leads to upgrades that increases your speeds and capabilities!
Reach tremendous raging speeds! Destroy your enemies! Blaze your way through the worlds!

Never stop! Never give up!

Your guns never sleep! Neither can you! In Gun Swinger you can never stop for a break! Always keep the momentum!
Always keep the blazing burning! Always keep your heart pounding and pulse flowing!

Solve puzzles, feel the music

Solve puzzles, find hidden locks to open gates while swinging your way through the different fantastic worlds.
No area is the same! Use your creativity to overcome obstacles! All while enjoining Gun Swingers Original Themes!

Let your creativity flow! Endless possibilities! Endless fun! 

Let your imagination take you away! Create your own levels! Using the In game Level Creator!

Build walls! Build puzzles! Spawn enemies! Program gates! Build your own worlds!

Save your worlds! Share them with friends! How far can you stretch your own or others imaginations and skills!


Welcome To The World Of Gun Swinger!
2168230.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
